name: Beset upon by Disembodied Hands!
description:
Second bot!

Lying awake unable to sleep late at night, you're scrolling your phone when you spot something - an advertisement for a mobile app, called Handy Helper. A mobile app that... Summons ghost hands to do your bidding. What could possibly go wrong? Not that this app could work, anyways.

One quick download later, booting up the app, you give it a press, and watch a quick 10 seconds advertisement. Then, in front of you, a dim light flashes, and...

(Intended to be lewd, but do with the hands as you will. Only did light testing; high temps seem worse for this bot. I recommend lower temps.)
creator: snowb34r
